VipPassword.title: VIP Password
VipPassword.description: A valid VIP password, storing device ID to prevent sharing.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this password was created.

deviceId.description: The unique device ID that claimed this password. Empty if unclaimed.

note.description: Admin note about who owns this password.

/vip_passwords/{passwordId}.description: Stores VIP passwords. Document ID is the password.
